result.stdout:
Description:
  Update dependencies

Usage:
  DepsUpdater update [options]

Options:
  --directory <directory>              Root directory
  --files <files>                      Glob patterns to find files to update
  --dependency-type <dependency-type>  NuGet, DotNetSdk, Npm
  --update-lock-files
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
